channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran’s ex-foreign minister Kharazi ‘gravely wounded’ in attack on his home
item.description: Apparent assassination attempt comes as Iran's army pledges to fight until the US, Israel face 'permanent surrender'.

item.title: Oil price surges, Asian stocks fall as Trump vows to continue Iran attacks
item.description: Asian stocks also took a hit after Trump’s speech as most Southeast Asian countries rely heavily on oil imports.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 34 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: As the war enters day 34, US President Donald Trump said Washington was close to achieving its objectives.

item.title: Mourners vow resistance as Iran marks Islamic Republic’s 47th anniversary
item.description: Thousands gathered in Tehran to honour a commander, vowing resistance amid heightened tension with US and Israel.

item.title: Trump’s primetime speech on Iran war: Key takeaways
item.description: US president says Washington is 'getting very close' to achieving goals as he promises to bomb Iran into 'Stone Ages'.

item.title: Trump’s national address on Iran ’embarrassing, incoherent’
item.description: Harlan Ullman, a former senior US naval officer, has slammed President Trump’s address to the nation.

item.title: Trump claims ‘success’ in Iran in just 32 days compared to lengthy US wars
item.description: US President Donald Trump said Iran was the ‘bully of the Middle East’ but is ‘no longer a threat’.

item.title: Trump threatens to bring Iran ‘back to the Stone Ages’
item.description: President Trump says the US will bring Iran ‘back to the Stone Ages where they belong' by striking hard.

item.title: Trump urges countries ‘get involved’ in war on Iran if they can’t get fuel
item.description: US President Donald Trump says nations that rely on oil from the Strait of Hormuz should build up some delayed courage.

item.title: Live: Trump threatens to hit Iran hard; Tehran pledges to ‘fight back’
item.description: Trump says the US is close to completing its core objectives, but Tehran says it won't tolerate 'vicious cycle of war'.
